skills.name: logical-deduction
skills.description: Apply formal logical rules to derive conclusions from premises
skills.example_prompt: Given that all fleet nodes run Linux and Alice is a fleet node, what OS does Alice run?

skills.name: causal-analysis
skills.description: Identify cause-and-effect relationships in complex systems
skills.example_prompt: Why did the nginx process crash after the config reload?

skills.name: analogical-reasoning
skills.description: Draw parallels between different domains to solve novel problems
skills.example_prompt: How is DNS resolution like a library card catalog?

skills.name: contradiction-detection
skills.description: Find logical inconsistencies in documents or arguments
skills.example_prompt: The README says 5 nodes but the config lists 6. Which is correct?

skills.name: hypothesis-generation
skills.description: Generate and rank plausible explanations for observed phenomena
skills.example_prompt: The API returns 502 only between 2-4am. What could cause this?

skills.name: decision-framework
skills.description: Structure multi-criteria decisions with tradeoff analysis
skills.example_prompt: Should we use PostgreSQL or SQLite for the edge nodes?

skills.name: abstraction
skills.description: Extract general principles from specific instances
skills.example_prompt: What pattern do all our successful deployments share?

skills.name: decomposition
skills.description: Break complex problems into manageable sub-problems
skills.example_prompt: How do we migrate 239 repos from GitHub to Gitea?

skills.name: temporal-reasoning
skills.description: Reason about sequences, schedules, and time-dependent events
skills.example_prompt: If backup starts at 2am and takes 45min, will it conflict with the 2:30 cron?

skills.name: constraint-satisfaction
skills.description: Find solutions that satisfy multiple simultaneous constraints
skills.example_prompt: Schedule 5 deploys across 3 nodes with no two deploys on the same node at once

skills.name: python-generation
skills.description: Generate production-ready Python code with error handling and tests
skills.example_prompt: Write a Python script that monitors disk usage and alerts via webhook

skills.name: javascript-generation
skills.description: Generate Node.js and browser JavaScript with modern patterns
skills.example_prompt: Write a Cloudflare Worker that proxies requests with rate limiting

skills.name: bash-generation
skills.description: Generate robust shell scripts with proper error handling
skills.example_prompt: Write a backup script that rsyncs to 3 nodes with retry logic

skills.name: sql-generation
skills.description: Generate SQL queries, schemas, and migrations
skills.example_prompt: Design a schema for tracking agent messages with full-text search

skills.name: api-design
skills.description: Design RESTful and WebSocket APIs with proper status codes
skills.example_prompt: Design an API for the agent dispatch system with auth

skills.name: refactoring
skills.description: Restructure existing code for clarity and maintainability
skills.example_prompt: This 500-line function does too much. Break it into modules.

skills.name: test-generation
skills.description: Generate comprehensive test suites for existing code
skills.example_prompt: Write pytest tests for the router module covering edge cases

skills.name: html-css-generation
skills.description: Generate responsive HTML/CSS with dark theme and brand colors
skills.example_prompt: Build a dashboard page showing 12 agent status cards

skills.name: config-generation
skills.description: Generate nginx, Docker, systemd, and other config files
skills.example_prompt: Write an nginx config that reverse-proxies 15 workers on ports 9001-9015

skills.name: rust-generation
skills.description: Generate safe Rust code for CLI tools and system utilities
skills.example_prompt: Write a Rust CLI that scans network ports on a subnet

skills.name: log-analysis
skills.description: Parse and analyze log files to identify patterns and anomalies
skills.example_prompt: Analyze nginx access logs and find the top error-producing endpoints

skills.name: metric-aggregation
skills.description: Aggregate time-series metrics and compute statistics
skills.example_prompt: Calculate p95 response time from the last 24h of API metrics

skills.name: json-transformation
skills.description: Transform, filter, and reshape JSON data structures
skills.example_prompt: Flatten this nested API response into a CSV-compatible format

skills.name: trend-detection
skills.description: Identify trends, seasonality, and outliers in data
skills.example_prompt: Is our memory usage trending upward over the past month?

skills.name: inventory-analysis
skills.description: Analyze and reconcile inventories across multiple sources
skills.example_prompt: Compare GitHub repos vs Gitea repos and find the gaps

skills.name: text-extraction
skills.description: Extract structured data from unstructured text
skills.example_prompt: Parse these error messages and extract timestamp, level, and component

skills.name: correlation-analysis
skills.description: Find correlations between different metrics or events
skills.example_prompt: Do deploy times correlate with the number of active Ollama models?

skills.name: capacity-planning
skills.description: Project future resource needs based on current usage trends
skills.example_prompt: At current growth, when will Alice run out of disk space?

skills.name: technical-writing
skills.description: Write clear technical documentation, guides, and READMEs
skills.example_prompt: Write a getting-started guide for the BlackRoad memory system

skills.name: brand-copywriting
skills.description: Write marketing copy consistent with BlackRoad brand voice
skills.example_prompt: Write landing page copy for the sovereign AI platform

skills.name: story-generation
skills.description: Generate narratives that explain complex systems through story
skills.example_prompt: Tell the story of a request traveling through the BlackRoad mesh

skills.name: naming
skills.description: Generate names for products, features, and projects using road metaphors
skills.example_prompt: Name a new service that translates between agent protocols

skills.name: summarization
skills.description: Condense long documents into concise summaries preserving key points
skills.example_prompt: Summarize this 50-page architecture doc into 10 bullet points

skills.name: explanation
skills.description: Explain technical concepts at any audience level
skills.example_prompt: Explain WireGuard VPN to someone who has never used a terminal

skills.name: email-drafting
skills.description: Draft professional emails for business, support, and outreach
skills.example_prompt: Draft a response to an investor asking about our infrastructure costs

skills.name: changelog-generation
skills.description: Generate release notes and changelogs from git history
skills.example_prompt: Generate a changelog from the last 50 commits on main

skills.name: health-check
skills.description: Diagnose system health across fleet nodes
skills.example_prompt: Check CPU, memory, disk, and network on all 5 Pi nodes

skills.name: deployment
skills.description: Plan and execute multi-node deployments with rollback
skills.example_prompt: Deploy the new chat worker to Octavia with zero downtime

skills.name: dns-management
skills.description: Configure and troubleshoot DNS records across providers
skills.example_prompt: Add a CNAME for search.blackroad.io pointing to the worker

skills.name: backup-restore
skills.description: Design and execute backup strategies with verification
skills.example_prompt: Backup all PostgreSQL databases to MinIO with encryption

skills.name: process-management
skills.description: Monitor, restart, and manage system processes and services
skills.example_prompt: Find and restart the crashed Ollama process on Cecilia

skills.name: network-diagnostics
skills.description: Troubleshoot network connectivity, routing, and firewall issues
skills.example_prompt: Why can Alice reach Cecilia but not Octavia on port 3100?

skills.name: cron-scheduling
skills.description: Design and manage cron jobs across the fleet
skills.example_prompt: Schedule index rebuilds every 6 hours staggered across nodes

skills.name: vulnerability-scan
skills.description: Scan code and configurations for known vulnerabilities
skills.example_prompt: Scan the nginx configs for security misconfigurations

skills.name: secret-detection
skills.description: Find exposed secrets, tokens, and credentials in codebases
skills.example_prompt: Scan all repos for accidentally committed API keys or passwords

skills.name: access-audit
skills.description: Audit user access, SSH keys, and permission models
skills.example_prompt: List all SSH keys across the fleet and identify unused ones

skills.name: encryption-setup
skills.description: Configure TLS, disk encryption, and secure communications
skills.example_prompt: Set up Let's Encrypt certificates for all 20 domains via Caddy

skills.name: firewall-hardening
skills.description: Configure iptables and network security rules
skills.example_prompt: Lock down Octavia to only accept connections from the WireGuard subnet

skills.name: incident-response
skills.description: Triage and respond to security incidents methodically
skills.example_prompt: Unknown SSH login detected on Alice at 3am. Investigate.

skills.name: compliance-check
skills.description: Verify systems meet security baselines and best practices
skills.example_prompt: Does our PostgreSQL setup follow CIS benchmark recommendations?
